nasb.text: ‘Behold, the day! Behold, it is coming! Your doom has gone forth; the rod has budded, arrogance has blossomed.

esv.text: “Behold, the day! Behold, it comes! Your doom has come; the rod has blossomed; pride has budded.

cnv.text: “‘看哪，這日子到了！ 災害已經發出， 杖已經開花， 狂傲已經發芽。

ccb.text: “看啊，看啊，日子到了，大祸临头了！杖已经发芽，傲慢已经开花。
